Class MainScreen

java.lang.Object
java.awt.Component
java.awt.Container
java.awt.Window
java.awt.Frame
javax.swing.JFrame
com.gomez.yourdownload.view.MainScreen
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImageObserver, MenuContainer, Serializable, Accessible, RootPaneContainer, WindowConstants
public class MainScreen extends JFrame
Main application windows for YourDownload Manages the user interface for downloading media, configure quality settings and synchronizing with the server.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Rubén Gómez Hernández
See Also:

    Constructs the main application screen.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private String
    getBinariesPath()
    Locates the yt-dlp executable path configured by the user or attempts to find it in common directories.
    private void
    handleNewFilesFound(com.gomez.component.NewMediaEvent event)
    Processes events triggered by the MediaPoller when new server files are discovered.
    private void
    initComponents()
    Automatically generated method by NetBeans GUI Builder to initialize forms.
    private void
    initMediaPoller(String token)
    Instantiates and starts the MediaPoller listener to receive new file updates from the server.
    private void
    jButtonChangeActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Allows the user to select a new folder to save downloaded files.
    private void
    jButtonDownloadActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Initiates the media download process.
    private void
    jButtonLibraryActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Triggers the transition from the main screen to the media library view.
    private void
    jButtonSavePathActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Opens a directory chooser to set the download destination path.
    private void
    jButtonShowLogActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Toggles the visibility of the text console for viewing detailed download logs.
    private void
    jCheckBoxSubtitlesYesActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the jCheckBoxSubtitlesYes.
    private void
    jLabelStatusMouseClicked(MouseEvent evt)
    Mouse listener for the polling status icon to manually toggle the syncing process.
    private void
    jMenuItemAboutActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Displays the About dialog with info about the application
    private void
    jMenuItemExitActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Closes the application with confirmation and saves history.
    private void
    jMenuItemLogoutActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Clears session preferences and forces the user to log in again.
    private void
    jMenuItemPreferencesActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Navigates to the user Preferences panel.
    private void
    jRadioButton1080ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the JRadioButton1080.
    private void
    jRadioButton720ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the JRadioButton720.
    private void
    jRadioButtonAVIActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Updates the UI state when AVI video format is selected.
    private void
    jRadioButtonHighActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the JButtonHigh.
    private void
    jRadioButtonHQActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the JRadioButtonHQ.
    private void
    jRadioButtonMP3ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Updates the UI state when MP3 audio format is selected, disabling video resolutions.
    private void
    jRadioMP4ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Updates the UI state when MP4 video format is selected.
    private void
    jTextFieldUrlActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
    Handles the action event for the JTextFieldUrl.
    private void
    logErrorMain(String message)
    Helper method to output major errors
    void
    loginSuccessful(String token)
    Handler invoked when the user successfully authenticates.
    static void
    main(String[] args)
    The main entry point of the application.
    private void
    makeIconOnlyButton(JButton btn, String iconPath, String tooltip)
    Formats a standard JButton to render purely as a clickable icon with no background box.
    private String
    obtainMimeSimple(String fileName)
    Determines the file format extension for classification in the library.
    private void
    setPanelEnabled(JPanel panel, boolean isEnabled)
    Enables or disables all interactive components within a parent container.
    private void
    showLibrary()
    Swaps the interface content pane from the main downloader view to the Media Library view.
    private void
    showLoginScreen()
    Renders the login screen interface by clearing menu bars and replacing the content pane.
    private void
    togglePolling()
    Pauses or resumes the MediaPoller checking thread.
    private void
    updateIconState(boolean on)
    Swaps the visual status icon based on the poller's active state.
    private void
    updateProgressBar(String line)
    Extracts progress percentages from yt-dlp console output and updates the UI progress bar.
    private void
    writeLog(String errorType, String details)
    Writes formatted error details to a local project text file for debugging.

  • Constructor Details

    • MainScreen

      public MainScreen(String token, com.gomez.component.MediaPoller pollerInstance)
      Constructs the main application screen. Initializes UI components, styles, and background services.
      Parameters:
      token - The JWT authentication token.
      pollerInstance - The MediaPoller component instance for server sync.

      private void jButtonSavePathActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Opens a directory chooser to set the download destination path.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event.

    • jMenuItemExitActionPerformed

      private void jMenuItemExitActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Closes the application with confirmation and saves history.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event.

    • jMenuItemAboutActionPerformed

      private void jMenuItemAboutActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Displays the About dialog with info about the application
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the menu item.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the dialog window fails to initialize properly.

    • jMenuItemPreferencesActionPerformed

      private void jMenuItemPreferencesActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Navigates to the user Preferences panel.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the menu item.
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - If the current content pane cannot be cast to a JPanel.

    • jButtonDownloadActionPerformed

      private void jButtonDownloadActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Initiates the media download process. It uses binaries form yt-dlp. Evaluates users selections (format, quality) to build the command, download files and update progress dynamically.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the download button.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the background thread fails to start or gets interrupted unexpectedly.

    • jButtonChangeActionPerformed

      private void jButtonChangeActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Allows the user to select a new folder to save downloaded files.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the change button.
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If local file system access is restricted.

    • jButtonLibraryActionPerformed

      private void jButtonLibraryActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Triggers the transition from the main screen to the media library view.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the library button.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the panel replacement process fails.

    • jRadioButton720ActionPerformed

      private void jRadioButton720ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Handles the action event for the JRadioButton720. This method is auto-generated by the designer. Reserved for future implementation

    • jRadioButtonHighActionPerformed

      private void jRadioButtonHighActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Handles the action event for the JButtonHigh. This method is auto-generated by the designer. Reserved for future implementation

    • jRadioButtonHQActionPerformed

      private void jRadioButtonHQActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Handles the action event for the JRadioButtonHQ. This method is auto-generated by the designer. Reserved for future implementation

    • jMenuItemLogoutActionPerformed

      private void jMenuItemLogoutActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Clears session preferences and forces the user to log in again.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the logout menu item.
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If the application does not have permission to access user preferences.

    • jButtonShowLogActionPerformed

      private void jButtonShowLogActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Toggles the visibility of the text console for viewing detailed download logs. Resizes the application window.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event triggered by the log button.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the set bounds are invalid for the window size.

    • jLabelStatusMouseClicked

      private void jLabelStatusMouseClicked(MouseEvent evt)
      Mouse listener for the polling status icon to manually toggle the syncing process.
      Parameters:
      evt - The mouse event triggered by clicking the status icon.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If the poller instance is null when clicked.

    • jRadioMP4ActionPerformed

      private void jRadioMP4ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Updates the UI state when MP4 video format is selected.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the panel state cannot be modified.

    • jRadioButtonMP3ActionPerformed

      private void jRadioButtonMP3ActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Updates the UI state when MP3 audio format is selected, disabling video resolutions.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the panel state cannot be modified.

    • jRadioButtonAVIActionPerformed

      private void jRadioButtonAVIActionPerformed(ActionEvent evt)
      Updates the UI state when AVI video format is selected.
      Parameters:
      evt - The action event.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the panel state cannot be modified.

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
      The main entry point of the application. Configures the UI theme and instantiates the application.
      Parameters:
      args - The command line arguments passed during execution.

    • updateProgressBar

      private void updateProgressBar(String line)
      Extracts progress percentages from yt-dlp console output and updates the UI progress bar.
      Parameters:
      line - A single line of standard output from the download process.
      Throws:
      NumberFormatException - If the regex successfully finds a pattern but parsing as Double fails.

    • obtainMimeSimple

      private String obtainMimeSimple(String fileName)
      Determines the file format extension for classification in the library.
      Parameters:
      fileName - The name of the file to inspect.
      Returns:
      The uppercase extension (e.g., "MP3"), or "FILE" if no extension exists.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If operations attempt to process a null string improperly (handled implicitly).

    • getBinariesPath

      private String getBinariesPath()
      Locates the yt-dlp executable path configured by the user or attempts to find it in common directories.
      Returns:
      The path string pointing to the executable, or an empty string if not found.
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If the environment restricts reading local app data or system environment variables.

    • showLibrary

      private void showLibrary()
      Swaps the interface content pane from the main downloader view to the Media Library view.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If instantiating the MediaLibrary panel encounters an error.

    • initMediaPoller

      private void initMediaPoller(String token)
      Instantiates and starts the MediaPoller listener to receive new file updates from the server.
      Parameters:
      token - The session JWT token to authenticate polling requests.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If the component instance is null, printing an error to the console.

    • handleNewFilesFound

      private void handleNewFilesFound(com.gomez.component.NewMediaEvent event)
      Processes events triggered by the MediaPoller when new server files are discovered. Filters duplicates and prompts the user to download new remote media.
      Parameters:
      event - The polling event containing the collection of newly found media models.
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If local writing permissions prevent downloading the actual files.

    • showLoginScreen

      private void showLoginScreen()
      Renders the login screen interface by clearing menu bars and replacing the content pane.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If the JFrame state prevents updating the content pane.

    • loginSuccessful

      public void loginSuccessful(String token)
      Handler invoked when the user successfully authenticates. Re-initializes the application view and starts synchronization polling.
      Parameters:
      token - The newly retrieved JWT authentication token.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If restoring the original UI panel fails.

    • togglePolling

      private void togglePolling()
      Pauses or resumes the MediaPoller checking thread.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If the component reference is inaccessible during the toggle.

    • updateIconState

      private void updateIconState(boolean on)
      Swaps the visual status icon based on the poller's active state.
      Parameters:
      on - true if polling is actively running, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the resource path provided for the icons is structurally invalid.

    • setPanelEnabled

      private void setPanelEnabled(JPanel panel, boolean isEnabled)
      Enables or disables all interactive components within a parent container.
      Parameters:
      panel - The JPanel containing the components to modify.
      isEnabled - State flag to dictate boolean enabled status.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If the provided panel argument is null.

    • makeIconOnlyButton

      private void makeIconOnlyButton(JButton btn, String iconPath, String tooltip)
      Formats a standard JButton to render purely as a clickable icon with no background box.
      Parameters:
      btn - The standard JButton to transform.
      iconPath - Path matching a resource graphic.
      tooltip - Informational text shown on mouse hover.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - If the button parameter provided is missing.

    • logErrorMain

      private void logErrorMain(String message)
      Helper method to output major errors
      Parameters:
      message - Detailed description of the error event.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If attempting to execute GUI updates from a detached thread fails.

    • writeLog

      private void writeLog(String errorType, String details)
      Writes formatted error details to a local project text file for debugging.
      Parameters:
      errorType - Short tag indicating the scope of the error (e.g. "ERROR 404").
      details - Full text describing what caused the malfunction.
      Throws:
      SecurityException - If the local JVM policy blocks the creation or editing of text files.
